sub_pixel_system.notes: Uses modified Doom engine; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Flight
special_mechanics.description: Player can fly; inherited from Doom engine modifications

special_mechanics.name: Environmental Momentum
special_mechanics.description: Rushing water that pushes the player character along

special_mechanics.name: Look Up/Down
special_mechanics.description: Ability to look up and down within constraints using proportional pixel-shearing effect rather than true 3D rendering; causes distortion at high-elevation angles

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. No precise movement parameters documented in available sources. Game based on modified Doom engine but specific physics values not disclosed in Wikipedia or TCRF sources consulted.
